title: CDS Abstract Entities — Structure types for RAP action signatures and API contracts
description: CDS Abstract Entities — Structure types for RAP action signatures and API contracts. Key topics: `define abstract entity` creates a CDS data type without generating any. No DDIC or database object is created when activated; abstract entities. They are the primary way to type RAP action parameters, r

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆`define abstract entity` creates a CDS data type without generating any
◆No DDIC or database object is created when activated; abstract entities
◆They are the primary way to type RAP action parameters, return structures,
◆Abstract entities can be used as association targets when the association
◆`ANNOTATE ENTITY ZPRAC_ABST_AIRPORT_DIST` enables metadata extensions

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
Key Learning Points

◆`define abstract entity` creates a CDS data type without generating any
◆No DDIC or database object is created when activated; abstract entities
◆They are the primary way to type RAP action parameters, return structures,
◆Abstract entities can be used as association targets when the association
◆`ANNOTATE ENTITY ZPRAC_ABST_AIRPORT_DIST` enables metadata extensions

CDS Source Code

/*
 * ====================================================================
 * CDS — Abstract Entity for RAP Action Signature
 * ====================================================================
 */

@EndUserText.label: 'Abstract Entity — Airport Distance Action'
define abstract entity ZPRAC_ABST_AIRPORT_DIST
{
  @EndUserText.label: 'Departure Airport Code'
  dep_airport : abap.char(3);

  @EndUserText.label: 'Destination Airport Code'
  dest_airport : abap.char(3);

  @EndUserText.label: 'Distance in Kilometers'
  distance_km  : abap.dec(10,2);

  @EndUserText.label: 'Unit of Measure'
  @Semantics.unitOfMeasure: true
  distance_uom : abap.char(3);
}

/*
 * ====================================================================
 * CDS — Metadata Extension for the Abstract Entity
 * ====================================================================
 */

@UI: {
  headerInfo: { typeName: 'Airport Distance', typeNamePlural: 'Airport Distances' },
  presentationVariant: [{ sortOrder: [{ by: 'distance_km', direction: #DESC }] }]
}
annotate entity ZPRAC_ABST_AIRPORT_DIST with
{
  @UI: { lineItem: [{ position: 10 }], identification: [{ position: 10 }] }
  dep_airport;

  @UI: { lineItem: [{ position: 20 }], identification: [{ position: 20 }] }
  dest_airport;

  @UI: { lineItem: [{ position: 30 }], identification: [{ position: 30 }] }
  distance_km;

  @UI: { lineItem: [{ position: 40 }], identification: [{ position: 40 }] }
  distance_uom;
}

/*
 * ====================================================================
 * RAP Behavior Definition — Action using the Abstract Entity
 * ====================================================================
 */

managed implementation in class zbp_prac_travel unique;
internal.

define behavior for ZPRAC_CDS_C_TravelWithMessage alias TravelMessage
persistent table /dmo/travel
draft table /dmo/td_travel
lock master
etag last_changed_at
{

  /* ... existing field & association definitions ... */

  action ( features : instance )
    CalculateAirportDistance
    parameter  ZPRAC_ABST_AIRPORT_DIST   " input
    result ZPRAC_ABST_AIRPORT_DIST;      " output

  /* ... further actions & validations ... */

}
details:
database object — it exists purely as a design-time type contract.

are zero-footprint types used only in the CDS / RAP type system.

and OData function import signatures without needing a DDIC structure.

is never materialised (e.g., a navigation that never needs a join).

without changing the source definition — useful for UI annotations.

USE CASES FOR ABSTRACT ENTITIES

Use Case | Example

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

RAP action input parameters | Action Input: ZPRAC_ABST_AIRPORT_DIST

RAP action result type | Action Result: ZPRAC_ABST_AIRPORT_DIST

OData function import parameters | Function Import: CalculateDistance

Association target (no instance) | _Airport as ZPRAC_ABST_Airport

Metadata extension target | ANNOTATE ENTITY ZPRAC_ABST_AIRPORT_DIST

Remote API communication | Input/output contract for outbound services
topic: define abstract entity for typed interfaces without data persistence
